title: Z More Carrots
body: ![Mod preview](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/937728636432289815/997818692945596517/Previem.png?width=1214&height=683) 🥕**This mod** adding 11 new carrots, with their own crafts and effects, explore the world with the mod **Z More Carrots**! 🔨 **How to install mod**: Download mod and [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), copy mods to C:\Users\ "USERNAME"\AppData\Roaming\ .minecraft\mods Download and install fabric, launch in launcher version fabric-loader-1.19 **You free to use this mod on your modpack.**
